---
title: "Workshop: Introduction to Python for Data Management and Analysis" 
subtitle: "_Updated April 21, 2026_"
format: 
  html: 
    page-layout: full
    grid: 
      sidebar-width: 800px
---

Hi COMPTEXT workshop participants, 

Here you can find all of the course materials for the <b>[Introduction to Python for Data Management and Analysis]()</b> that took place on April 23, 2026. 

## Introduction to Python for Data Management and Analysis 

### Course preparation 

We will be using [Google Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/) for this course. You don't need to do anything to set this up outside of having a Google account. 
 
For applied examples with data, we will be using the [__Manifesto Project Database__](https://manifesto-project.wzb.eu/). Please download the __version 2025a__ data (csv) from here: [https://manifesto-project.wzb.eu/datasets/MPDS2025a](https://manifesto-project.wzb.eu/datasets/MPDS2025a). 

We will review how to load the dataset into Google Colab from your local files during the course.

### Course materials 

- [Slides](files/intro-python-comptext.html)
- [Handout](files/COMPTEXT2026_Intro_Python_handout.pdf)
- [Colab notebook](https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1CteydSOrg9-9ink193nLP2ToTxuzppst)
